notes: It runs perfectly, the only issue is when you first start the game, you have to minimise the game and then only select the set-up window, then you can choose your settings, click ok, and then you click on the main window again and it starts the game. This effects all of Core Design Tomb Raiders (except AOD) and the black window at the start shouldn't actually be there.
title: Tomb Raider III

notes:
Out of the box sound didn't work and the config window was hidden behind a black screen. By Alt+Tab got it to focus and set and tested my settings. Now everything is working (including video clips).
Switching to desktop will show black screen on return. The only way I found to restore it is to toggle the display resolution (Escape, Down, Left, Action, Left, Right)
title: Tomb Raider III
